candidate_schema.location: add to baseline_metadata.json as flat quote_integrity block

invariants.text: evaluation_status=not_evaluated implies verdict=null and schema_version=null and evaluated_run_id=null
evaluation_status=evaluated requires schema_version and evaluated_run_id and summary_path
blocked_no_report source run cannot be promoted (promotion_eligibility=ineligible)
checker_error source run cannot be promoted (promotion_eligibility=ineligible)
legacy GREEN alone does not imply promotion eligibility · requires evaluated QI
quote_integrity RED cannot be promoted once blocking_mode=blocking
under telemetry_only, RED baseline candidate requires promotion_eligibility=requires_review with human sign-off
evaluated baseline must point to immutable committed run artifact + immutable DECISION
baseline metadata must not claim QI result that was not actually evaluated
checker schema_version change requires either explicit compatibility annotation or re-evaluation
promotion never silently changes blocking_mode · promotion DECISION must state intended mode

architecture_option_A_note: Add flat quote_integrity block directly to baseline_metadata.json (backward compatible · single source of truth per baseline · deprecates the prose note)
current_A_B_recommendation: Option-1 retroactive annotation under a later explicit AgentOps-5e-migrate DECISION · records already-known truth (not_evaluated + grandfathered=true) · does NOT re-classify QI · needs explicit exception to 5a grandfathering rule

review_required: schema_version different from current checker schema_version

schema_compatibility_policy.rule: exact match by default · explicit compatibility allowlist per DECISION for cross-version reuse
schema_compatibility_policy.drift_handling: either re-evaluate with new schema or add compatibility_allowed_from_versions field to promotion DECISION

source_of_truth_map.evaluation_status: baseline_metadata.quote_integrity (derived from wrapper output at promotion time)
source_of_truth_map.counts: NOT stored in baseline · always read from source regression_runs/<runId>/quote_integrity_summary.json
source_of_truth_map.red_reasons + amber_reasons: NOT stored in baseline · always read from source

Q1_metadata_vs_registry.recommendation: direct baseline_metadata block (single source of truth · lower migration cost · uses existing baseline lifecycle)

options: leave frozen · new schema for future only

options: eligible with human review under telemetry_only
Q3_telemetry_only_red_eligibility.recommendation: requires_review with human sign-off under telemetry_only · always ineligible if blocking_mode=blocking (matches R1 policy locked in 5c DECISION)

Q4_schema_compatibility.recommendation: exact match by default · explicit allowlist per DECISION (avoid silent compatibility assumptions)

options: require R1 remediation before any promotion
allow promotion of RED baselines under review + telemetry_only
